## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Docker / deployment
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Compliance / licensing
- [ ] Refactor

## Compliance checklist

- [ ] I did not commit secrets, tokens, databases, logs, uploaded recordings, production config files, or private keys.
- [ ] I preserved `LICENSE`, `NOTICE`, and third-party attribution.
- [ ] I did not add incompatible license dependencies.
- [ ] I did not imply official affiliation with RustDesk, Huawei, HarmonyOS, OpenHarmony, or other third-party vendors.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior, deployment, or compatibility changed.
- [ ] I considered AGPL-3.0 source availability obligations for network use.

## Testing

Describe how this was tested.
